name: Rudresh Mahanthappa
abstract: Rudresh Mahanthappa (born May 4, 1971) is a New York-based jazz alto saxophonist and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: touring with my own group, the Jack DeJohnette group, which features Rudresh Mahanthappa on alto saxophone
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Toots Thielemans
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Oh. Vijay Iyer. He’s a piano player. And then Rudresh Mahanthappa. [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah. ... [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah. And oh. The tenor playing with him, I like. Rudish…
